title: senecio iodanthus
intro: Senecio iodanthus, also known as Iodanthus senecioides, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments due to its rich content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio iodanthus include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
